_comment: Panda recommendation catalog. Edit freely — no code changes needed.

_schema.id: unique string key (never change once shipped)
_schema.category: music | breathing | movement | sleep | focus | social | nutrition | journal
_schema.title: Short display title
_schema.subtitle: One-line description shown on the card
tags: keywords matched against session slots, journal mood, and user goals

recommendations.title: Box Breathing
recommendations.subtitle: Inhale 4s · Hold 4s · Exhale 4s · Hold 4s — repeat 4×

recommendations.title: 4-7-8 Breathing
recommendations.subtitle: Inhale 4s · Hold 7s · Exhale 8s — powerful for sleep onset

recommendations.title: Physiological Sigh
recommendations.subtitle: Double inhale through nose, long exhale — instant calm

recommendations.title: Belly Breathing
recommendations.subtitle: Deep diaphragmatic breathing to activate the parasympathetic system

recommendations.title: Energising Breath
recommendations.subtitle: Wim Hof-style breathing to boost alertness and energy

recommendations.title: Desk Stretch Routine
recommendations.subtitle: Neck, shoulders, wrists — perfect for post-work tension

recommendations.title: 10-Minute Walk
recommendations.subtitle: Even a short walk outside significantly reduces cortisol

recommendations.title: Bedtime Yoga
recommendations.subtitle: 10-min gentle yoga sequence to prepare your body for sleep

recommendations.title: Quick HIIT
recommendations.subtitle: High-intensity interval to burn off stress hormones fast

recommendations.title: Cold Water Splash
recommendations.subtitle: Cold water on face/wrists triggers the dive reflex, slowing heart rate

recommendations.title: Progressive Muscle Relaxation
recommendations.subtitle: Tense and release each muscle group — great for physical tension

recommendations.title: Wind-Down Routine
recommendations.subtitle: Dim lights 1hr before bed, avoid screens, do light stretching

recommendations.title: Sleep Cast
recommendations.subtitle: Headspace: spoken-word sleep stories to quiet a busy mind

recommendations.title: Caffeine Cut-Off
recommendations.subtitle: Caffeine has a 6hr half-life — try stopping intake by 2 PM

recommendations.title: Pomodoro Technique
recommendations.subtitle: 25 min focused work · 5 min break — reduces deadline stress

recommendations.title: Brain Dump
recommendations.subtitle: Write down every open task for 5 min — clears working memory

recommendations.title: 2-Minute Rule
recommendations.subtitle: If it takes < 2 min, do it now — kills procrastination loops

recommendations.title: Reach Out to Someone
recommendations.subtitle: Even a 5-min text to a friend measurably boosts mood

recommendations.title: Setting a Boundary
recommendations.subtitle: "I can't take that on right now" — a simple script to try

recommendations.title: Drink Water
recommendations.subtitle: Even mild dehydration worsens anxiety and concentration

recommendations.title: Magnesium-Rich Snack
recommendations.subtitle: Dark chocolate, almonds, or spinach — all help regulate cortisol

recommendations.title: 3 Good Things
recommendations.subtitle: Write down 3 things that went well today — powerful mood reset

recommendations.title: Stress Reframe
recommendations.subtitle: Write: "What's in my control here?" — reduces rumination

recommendations.title: Body Scan Check-In
recommendations.subtitle: Notice where you're holding tension and name it — reduces it
